query:
SELECT id, claim_id, 
  CASE WHEN damage_photos_json IS NULL THEN 'NULL' WHEN damage_photos_json = '' THEN 'EMPTY' ELSE SUBSTRING(damage_photos_json, 1, 500) END as damage_photos_sample,
  CASE WHEN physics_analysis IS NULL THEN 'NULL' WHEN physics_analysis = '' THEN 'EMPTY' ELSE SUBSTRING(physics_analysis, 1, 300) END as physics_sample
FROM ai_assessments ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;
